title: [FIRRTL] LowerAnnotations: Generate RefOps from GrandCentralView annotations
body:
This PR updates the LowerAnnotations pass to generate the `ref.send` and `ref.resolve` ops while scattering the GrandCentral View annotations. The Interface generation is still delayed till the GrandCentral pass.
There are few other PRs that need to be merged before this PR can pass the tests.


TODO:

- [x] Remove the downward only reference constraint on RefType
- [x] Fix the InferResets, ModuleInliner passes to handle RefType
- [x] Fix the LowerXMR pass to handle upward reference XMR.
- [x] Update the Instance path caches, to add capability to replace old Instances with new ones.
- [x] Add Lit tests.
